report.summary: Community growth cycle v32: Morpho Protocol guide launch amplification (Apollo Global $938B AUM, 90M MORPHO tokens, $10B+ TVL, modular vs monolithic lending wars) + Pectra T-14 countdown (EIP-7702 smart wallets, batch transactions, social recovery) + Prediction markets $5B weekly volume (AI agents 376% ROI, Kalshi vs Polymarket) + Copy trading $2.4B daily volume (Bybit/Bitget/OKX deep dive) + Trading bots guide distribution; weekly newsletter draft for May 8; 2 engagement posts for May 9; calendar filled Mon-Sun May 5-11; 2 new social cards created (morpho-apollo-deal, pectra-t14-countdown).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Mon May 5 AM, 5 posts): Morpho Protocol / Apollo Global — $938B AUM firm locks 90M MORPHO tokens (9% supply, 48 months), $10B+ TVL, Morpho Blue immutable core, MetaMorpho vaults (Gauntlet/Steakhouse/Re7), V2 fixed-rate loans for institutional desks, modular vs monolithic comparison; CTA to /learn/morpho-protocol-guide + /tools/lending-comparison
Tweet (Mon May 5 AM): Morpho single — Apollo infrastructure positioning, not VC speculation, V2 fixed-rate loans

Twitter thread (Tue May 6 AM, 5 posts): Pectra T-14 — EIP-7702 smart wallets, batch transactions, gas in any token, social recovery, session keys, 11 EIPs, biggest upgrade since the Merge; CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide + /learn/smart-wallets-guide-2026
Tweet (Tue May 6 AM): Pectra single — 14 days countdown, smart wallet features, no migration needed

Twitter thread (Wed May 7 AM, 5 posts): Prediction Markets — $5B weekly volume, AI agents 376% ROI, Kalshi $260M 2025 revenue, Polymarket $33.8B, regulatory split, non-financial price discovery; CTA to /learn/crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026 + /tools/prediction-market-calculator
Tweet (Wed May 7 AM): Prediction markets single — $5B weekly, AI agents dominating, price discovery layer
Newsletter (Thu May 8): Weekly edition — Morpho/Apollo lead, Pectra countdown, prediction markets, copy trading & bots guides, Degen Corner on TradFi rebuilding DeFi
Tweet (Fri May 9 AM): DeFi lending poll — Aave V4 (audits) vs Morpho (architecture) vs Compound (track record)
Tweet (Fri May 9 PM): Smart wallets discussion — does EIP-7702 change daily crypto experience

Twitter thread (Sat May 10 AM, 5 posts): Copy Trading — $2.4B daily volume, Bybit/Bitget/OKX comparison, lead trader evaluation (6+ months, <30% drawdown, consistent returns), red flags; CTA to /learn/crypto-copy-trading-guide + /exchanges
Tweet (Sat May 10 AM): Copy trading single — leaderboard shows gains, drawdown chart shows risk
Tweet (Sun May 11 AM): Weekly market wrap — Morpho/Apollo, Pectra T-6, prediction markets, copy trading, DeFi lending wars

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-morpho-apollo-deal.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with purple/cyan glows; 'INSTITUTIONAL SIGNAL' badge with purple pulse; title 'Apollo Global Goes DeFi'; subtitle '$938B asset manager locks in 9% of Morpho Protocol'; 4 glass stat cards (Apollo AUM $938B amber, MORPHO Tokens 90M purple, Morpho TVL $10B+ cyan, DeFi Lending $55B green); modular vs monolithic comparison (Morpho Blue vs Aave V4 side-by-side); V2 feature callout (fixed-rate loans); indigo CTA to morpho-protocol-guide. Saved to /public/social-morpho-apollo-deal.svg

social-pectra-t14-countdown.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with indigo-cyan gradient glow; 'UPGRADE COUNTDOWN' badge with cyan pulse; large 'T-14 DAYS' gradient countdown; title 'Pectra: Your Wallet Gets a Brain'; 4 feature cards (Batch Transactions green, Gas Flexibility cyan, Social Recovery purple, Session Keys amber); stat bar (11 EIPs, EIP-7702, No migration); indigo CTA button to pectra-upgrade-guide. Saved to /public/social-pectra-t14-countdown.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Morpho Protocol (Mon May 5): Freshly built guide (build-v14) — 3,100 words, MorphoVaultExplorer interactive component, Apollo Global $938B deal is the strongest institutional DeFi signal this quarter. Links to new guide + lending comparison tool + DeFi lending hub. First social amplification of newly published content.

Pectra Countdown (Tue May 6): T-14 to Apr 10 upgrade. EIP-7702 smart wallets are the most consumer-facing change — tangible UX improvements (batch tx, gas flexibility, social recovery). Search intent for 'Pectra upgrade' accelerating daily. Links to Pectra guide + smart wallets guide.

Prediction Markets (Wed May 7): $5B weekly volume milestone. AI agents angle (376% ROI) is novel and underserved in crypto media. Kalshi vs Polymarket regulatory split is a strong narrative. Links to prediction markets guide + new calculator tool.

Newsletter (Thu May 8): Institutional (Morpho/Apollo) + Technical (Pectra) + Emerging (prediction markets) = three audience segments. Two new guides from publish queue (copy trading, trading bots) get first distribution. Degen Corner TradFi thesis is thought-provoking.
Engagement (Fri May 9): Lending protocol poll timely with Morpho guide. Smart wallets discussion timely with Pectra countdown. Both designed for high reply/bookmark rates.
Copy Trading (Sat May 10): Newly published from queue. $2.4B daily volume is a surprising stat. Practical, actionable weekend content. Links to copy trading guide + exchanges hub.
507+ pages published, Morpho freshly added. Calendar filled Mon-Sun May 5-11. No conflicts with v31 (Apr 21-27) or v32 (Apr 28 – May 4).
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v33.md
Morpho Apollo social card saved to /public/social-morpho-apollo-deal.svg
Pectra T-14 countdown social card saved to /public/social-pectra-t14-countdown.svg
